title: More Camels
body:
This is mob variation for Camels <3 You can now have four Camel types to randomly spawn~

--
I made all the textures except the brown camel, it was based on the texturing from [Alphaxenopete82's Bactrian Camel](https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/zzhjqv/bactrian_camel_model_for_fun_after_alldromedary/) photo on Reddit. Please contact me in case you would like this to be taken down. Thank you!
